summary:
The test passes. 

**The bug:** In `/app/app/app.py`, the pagination offset calculation had an off-by-one error:

```python
# Buggy:
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)

# Fixed:
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

The `- (1 if page > 1 else 0)` was incorrectly subtracting 1 from the offset for all pages after page 1, causing items to overlap across page boundaries (e.g., the last item on page 1 would also appear as the first item on page 2).
